nasb.text: For our kings, our leaders, our priests and our fathers have not kept Your law Or paid attention to Your commandments and Your admonitions with which You have admonished them.

esv.text: Our kings, our princes, our priests, and our fathers have not kept your law or paid attention to your commandments and your warnings that you gave them.

cnv.text: 我們的君王和領袖，我們的祭司和列祖，都沒有遵行你的律法， 也沒有留心聽從你的誡命和你向他們鄭重的警告。

ccb.text: 我们的王、首领、祭司和祖先没有遵行你的律法，也没有留心听从你的诫命和你给他们的警告。
